title: 5. Market Data & Risk / 行情与风控
description: Market tickers, funding rates, risk events, learning pipeline

panels.title: Price Tracker (Top Symbols) / 价格追踪

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, last_price, symbol FROM market_tickers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND symbol IN (SELECT symbol FROM market_tickers GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY MAX(volume_24h) DESC LIMIT 5) ORDER BY ts;
SELECT ts AS time, funding_rate, symbol FROM market_tickers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND funding_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts;
SELECT ts AS time, open_interest, symbol FROM market_tickers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND open_interest IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts;
SELECT ts AS time, (ask_price - bid_price) / NULLIF(last_price, 0) * 10000 AS spread_bps, symbol FROM market_tickers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND bid_price > 0 AND ask_price > 0 ORDER BY ts;

panels.title: Risk Events Timeline / 风控事件时间线

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, event_type, symbol, severity, layer, detail FROM risk_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Risk Events by Type / 风控事件分类

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM risk_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY event_type;
SELECT event_type, status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM learning_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY event_type, status ORDER BY event_type, status;

panels.title: Recent Learning Events / 最近学习事件

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, event_type, title, status, confidence FROM learning_events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Volume by Symbol / 按品种成交量

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol, SUM(volume_24h) AS total_volume FROM market_tickers WHERE ts = (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM market_tickers) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY total_volume DESC LIMIT 10;
